arguments.expression: console.log('=== JavaScript API Test ==='); console.log('Error object:', typeof Error); console.log('Error.captureStackTrace:', typeof Error.captureStackTrace); console.log('Function constructor:', typeof Function); console.log('eval function:', typeof eval); console.log('Object.defineProperty:', typeof Object.defineProperty); console.log('Object.defineProperties:', typeof Object.defineProperties); console.log('Array.prototype.splice:', typeof Array.prototype.splice); console.log('Array.prototype.filter:', typeof Array.prototype.filter); console.log('Array.prototype.forEach:', typeof Array.prototype.forEach); console.log('String.fromCharCode:', typeof String.fromCharCode); console.log('Math.floor:', typeof Math.floor); console.log('Math.random:', typeof Math.random); try { var err = new Error('test'); console.log('Error stack:', typeof err.stack); } catch(e) { console.log('Error creation failed:', e.message); } 'Complete'
